approved_by: human ratification selecting option 1 for R1 and approving E7 bootstrap execution

input_snapshot.algorithm: sha256 over sorted per-file sha256 digests (excluding .DS_Store)

execution_metadata.note: Tool versions are an execution snapshot, not normative governance.

modified_files: apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/screens/HomeScreen.tsx — added 'Mis reservas' quick-action button linking to /bookings.
apps/mobile/src/features/marketplace/screens/ServiceDetailScreen.tsx — enabled request button and navigation to request flow.
apps/mobile/src/features/technician/screens/TechnicianHomeScreen.tsx — added 'Mis trabajos' quick-action button linking to /jobs.
packages/domain/src/aggregates/Booking.ts — added public getters for price, scheduledAt, address, notes, and professionalId.
packages/domain/src/use-cases/index.ts — exported new booking lifecycle use cases.
deleted_files: packages/domain/src/__tests__/repositories/InMemoryBookingRepository.ts — relocated to packages/domain/src/repositories/InMemoryBookingRepository.ts so the fake service can share it.
mutations.note: node_modules/ and .turbo/ directories are install/build artifacts and are not listed as authored mutations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Adopted the E4 canonical booking state machine: Draft -> Requested -> Accepted -> ProfessionalAssigned -> EnRoute -> Arrived -> InProgress -> Completed -> PaymentPending -> Paid -> Closed, plus terminal branches.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Human ratification of option 1; replaces FLOW-001 vocabulary for implementation.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: Customer confirms payment through BookingActionBar; no real payment provider integration.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: D2 (payment gateway sequencing) remains deferred; E7 delivers the lifecycle without a live payments expedition.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: FakeBookingService backed by the domain InMemoryBookingRepository; toBookingDto maps aggregates to BookingDto.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: E7 delivers the complete workflow without requiring live backend or new migrations.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: (customer)/bookings/* for customer reservation flows and (technician)/jobs/* for technician execution flows.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Follows E5 route-group conventions and NAV-001 role-based navigation.

local_decisions_finalized.choice: TechnicianJobDetailScreen casts session.user.id to ProfessionalId for the accept action.
local_decisions_finalized.reason: Acceptable only for the fake service; real implementation must resolve the authenticated user's professional profile.

deviations_from_plan.justification: The fake mobile service needs a shared in-memory repository; keeping it under __tests__ would leak test infrastructure into production imports.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: Added public getters to Booking aggregate.
deviations_from_plan.justification: Use-case outputs and the DTO mapper need read access to internal state while preserving aggregate encapsulation.

deviations_from_plan.deviation: CustomerBookingDetailScreen passes booking.professionalId (or a placeholder cast) as actorId to BookingActionBar.
deviations_from_plan.justification: actorId is only used for the technician accept action; the customer view does not trigger that action. The prop contract will be refined when real authentication/professional resolution exists.

exclusions: No real payment provider integration (D2 deferred).
No supabase/config.toml or backend migrations beyond E4.
No changes to knowledge/ authored artifacts.
No changes to .synth/ governance primitives beyond this replay record and governance-0017.
No git commits, branches, or pushes performed.
